title: Worktree — Hotfix While Mid-Feature
description: You're deep into feature work on `feat/recommendations` with uncommitted changes you can't stash. A critical bug needs to be fixed on `main` right now. Use `git worktree` to check out `main` in a separate directory, apply the hotfix there, and return to your feature work untouched.
objective: A hotfix commit must be present on `main` that adds error handling to `api.js`. You must return to `feat/recommendations` with your in-progress changes still present exactly as before the hotfix. No extra worktrees should remain attached after cleanup.
hints: `git worktree add ../hotfix-tree main` creates a linked working tree for `main` in a sibling directory.
Work in `../hotfix-tree`, commit the fix, then remove the worktree with `git worktree remove ../hotfix-tree`.
Your original working tree and branch are untouched throughout.
